articles.title: Local Leader Outlines Economic Growth Priorities to Rochdale Development Agency
articles.excerpt: A local leader has sent a letter to the Chief Executive of the Rochdale Development Agency, detailing priorities for economic growth, including skills training and eco-friendly initiatives.
articles.content_html:
A local leader has sent a letter to Rachel Laver, the new Chief Executive of the Rochdale Development Agency, outlining priorities for growing the local economy.

The letter highlights the importance of skills and training to provide young people and workers with future opportunities. It also emphasises the need for eco-friendly initiatives to support sustainable development in the area.

The leader's proposals aim to address current economic challenges and foster a more resilient local economy.

Further details on the specific initiatives and how they will be implemented are expected to be discussed in future meetings with the agency.

articles.title: EnjoyTravel Names 18-Man Squad to Face Rochdale Hornets
articles.excerpt: EnjoyTravel has announced its 18-man squad ahead of the match against Rochdale Hornets this afternoon, as excitement builds for the game.
articles.content_html:
EnjoyTravel has named its 18-man squad to face Rochdale Hornets this afternoon. The announcement comes as anticipation grows for the match.

The squad features a mix of experienced players and emerging talent, aiming to secure a victory against their rivals.

Fans are encouraged to support the team as they prepare for what promises to be an exciting encounter at Spotland.

Details regarding the match start time and ticket availability can be found on the club's official website.

articles.title: Rochdale to Face Al-Rayyan SC in Club Friendly Match
articles.excerpt: Rochdale will play against Al-Rayyan SC in a club friendly match on 19 July 2026, as part of their pre-season preparations.
articles.content_html:
ONGOING STORY — Updated 19 July 2026 at 10:25. 6 source updates have been combined into this article.

Rochdale will play against Al-Rayyan SC in a club friendly match on 19 July 2026, as part of their pre-season preparations.

Latest update

Rochdale will host Al-Rayyan SC in a club friendly match on 19 July 2026. The match is part of Rochdale's pre-season preparations ahead of the upcoming football season.

Details regarding the time and venue for the match have not yet been announced. Fans are encouraged to stay tuned for further updates as the date approaches.

This friendly match will provide an opportunity for Rochdale to assess their squad and strategies against international opposition.

The match is expected to attract local supporters and could have implications for team morale and performance in the forthcoming season.

Earlier developments

Rochdale will compete against Al Rayyan in an upcoming match, as confirmed by BettingStats.org. The match details were published on July 18, 2026.

The event is expected to attract attention from local fans and sports enthusiasts. Further specifics regarding the match, including the date and location, will be announced in due course.

Fans are encouraged to stay updated through official channels for any changes or additional information regarding the match.

This fixture represents an opportunity for Rochdale to showcase their skills against international competition.

  • 18 July 2026, 23:55: Rochdale to Face Al Rayyan in Upcoming Match

articles.title: Councillor Speaks at Full Council Meeting in Rochdale Town Hall
articles.excerpt: A councillor attended the Full Council meeting at Rochdale Town Hall, advocating for the residents of North Heywood and supporting an amendment to an opposition motion.
articles.content_html:
A councillor attended and spoke at the Full Council meeting at Rochdale Town Hall this week. The councillor represented the residents of North Heywood, advocating for their interests during the session.

During the meeting, the councillor supported an amendment to an opposition motion proposed by the Labour and Co-operative controlling group. This amendment aimed to address specific concerns raised by the community.

The Full Council meeting provided a platform for various issues affecting the ward and the town to be discussed, highlighting the councillor's commitment to local governance.

Further details regarding the outcomes of the meeting or the specific issues addressed were not disclosed in the source material.
